scripts.test:examples: node examples/m5-alpha/run-all.mjs && node examples/m6-offline/catalog-conformance.mjs && node examples/m7a-independent-catalogs/dist/run-trial.js && node examples/m7b-diagnostics/dist/run.js
scripts.test:m8b0: pnpm --filter @nicia-ai/lachesis-m8b0-cli-contract typecheck && pnpm --filter @nicia-ai/lachesis-m8b0-cli-contract build && pnpm --filter @nicia-ai/lachesis-m8b0-cli-contract generate && pnpm --filter @nicia-ai/lachesis-m8b0-cli-contract test
scripts.audit:release-checksums: shasum -a 256 -c docs/m6-results.sha256 && shasum -a 256 -c docs/m6c-release.sha256 && shasum -a 256 -c docs/m7c-alpha3-release.sha256
scripts.audit:m8b-history: pnpm audit:m8b0-results && pnpm audit:m8b1-stage1 && pnpm audit:m8b1a-results && pnpm audit:m8b1b-results
scripts.verify:release: pnpm format:check && pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm test:coverage && pnpm build && pnpm smoke && pnpm test:examples && pnpm test:load && pnpm audit:source-safety && pnpm audit:public-api && pnpm audit:release-checksums && pnpm audit:m7c-preregistration && pnpm audit:packages
scripts.verify:m8b1a: pnpm exec vitest run apps/cli/tests/canonical-hardening.test.ts apps/cli/tests/report-contract.test.ts && pnpm audit:m8b-history
scripts.verify:m8b1b: pnpm exec vitest run apps/cli/tests/canonical-hardening.test.ts apps/cli/tests/kernel.test.ts && pnpm audit:m8b-history
scripts.test:m8b1-stage2: pnpm build && pnpm exec vitest run apps/cli/tests/catalog-manifest-command.test.ts apps/cli/tests/report-contract.test.ts apps/cli/tests/canonical-hardening.test.ts && node scripts/test-m8b1-stage2-packed.mjs
scripts.verify:m8b1-stage2: pnpm test:m8b1-stage2 && pnpm audit:m8b-history && pnpm audit:m8b1-stage2-results
scripts.verify:m8b1-stage2a: pnpm test:m8b1-stage2 && pnpm audit:m8b-history && pnpm audit:m8b1-stage2-results && pnpm audit:m8b1-stage2a-results
scripts.test:m8b1-stage3: pnpm build && pnpm exec vitest run apps/cli/tests/catalog-compare-command.test.ts apps/cli/tests/catalog-manifest-command.test.ts apps/cli/tests/report-contract.test.ts apps/cli/tests/canonical-hardening.test.ts && node scripts/test-m8b1-stage3-packed.mjs
scripts.verify:m8b1-stage3: pnpm test:m8b1-stage3 && pnpm audit:m8b-history && pnpm audit:m8b1-stage2-results && pnpm audit:m8b1-stage2a-results && pnpm audit:m8b1-stage3-results
scripts.test:m8b1-stage4: pnpm build && pnpm exec vitest run apps/cli/tests/catalog-conformance-command.test.ts apps/cli/tests/catalog-compare-command.test.ts apps/cli/tests/catalog-manifest-command.test.ts apps/cli/tests/report-contract.test.ts apps/cli/tests/canonical-hardening.test.ts examples/m7b-diagnostics/tests/m8b1-stage4a1-manifest-binding.test.ts && node scripts/test-m8b1-stage4-packed.mjs
scripts.verify:m8b1-stage4: pnpm test:m8b1-stage4 && pnpm audit:m8b-history && pnpm audit:m8b1-stage2-results && pnpm audit:m8b1-stage2a-results && pnpm audit:m8b1-stage3-results && shasum -a 256 -c docs/m8b1-stage4a-results.sha256 && shasum -a 256 -c docs/m8b1-stage4a1-results.sha256 && pnpm audit:m8b1-stage4-results
scripts.check: pnpm format:check && pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm build
scripts.smoke: pnpm --filter @nicia-ai/lachesis-generator smoke && pnpm --filter @nicia-ai/lachesis-evidence smoke && pnpm --filter @nicia-ai/lachesis-evidence-typegraph smoke && pnpm --filter @nicia-ai/lachesis-benchmark smoke && pnpm --filter @nicia-ai/lachesis-node-smoke test && pnpm --filter @nicia-ai/lachesis-worker-smoke test
